template.p: This setup is perfect for yoga and pilates studios offering group classes, private sessions, memberships, and wellbeing events. Odoo helps you streamline your class scheduling, memberships, instructor management, and customer engagement in one place.

With the Appointments App, you can easily set up class planning, and with the Subscription App, you can manage recurring memberships like Unlimited Monthly Access. The Website App allows you to showcase your offers and let members book sessions seamlessly.
Move with ease, book with clarity, and stay aligned with your practice—seamlessly renew and flow through your wellness journey. 🧘‍♀️
You can access every installed app in your Odoo database from your main dashboard.

li.p: The Appointment App schedules yoga and pilates classes for easy booking.
The Planning App assigns instructors based on expertise and availability.
The Subscription App manages memberships like The Flow Membership: Unlimited Yoga for one month.
The Website App promotes your studio, explain your approach and enables online class bookings.
The Event App organizes wellbeing session to engage your community
The Survey App collects feedback to ensure your wellbeing offerings align with your clients' expectations.
The Employees App tracks schedules, roles, and expertise.
The CRM App converts leads into long-term members.
The Sales App simplifies membership purchases and upgrades.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o_not_editable lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone into a tool to manage your entire workflow.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various processes you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o_not_editable lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3

div.div: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Yoga & Pilates Studio Package and check the related box.

template.h3: Defining your Yoga and Pilates offer

ol.li:
Create your products: Create flexible membership options for your clients such as single class entries or subscription plans,
offering them a variety of choices for their practice.

li.span: Set Pricelistes: Define specific pricing for each membership to ensure clients pay the right price according to their plan.

ol.li: Automate renewals: Set up a recurring plan for automatic subscription renewals, such as an unlimited monthly yoga pass.
Manage cancellations: Set an end date for a subscription to automatically close, or allow clients to manage and cancel their subscription themselves via their Odoo portal.

template.h3: Organize your class schedule & assign instructors

li.strong: Create your Yoga and Pilates schedule:

li.p: Set up class types in the Appointment app (e.g., Vinyasa Yoga, Pilates Reformer).
Define the class schedule and assign specific resources (e.g., Garden room) with capacity limits.
Link each class to a product (e.g., "Yoga Single Entry" for a Morning Flow class).
Define instructor expertise: In the Work Information section of an employee, define employee's expertise by using the Role field.
Set up your yoga instructor planning: Create your class planning based on the studio’s operating hours.
Assign instructors automatically: With the auto-plan option, instructors will be assigned to classes based on their expertise and availability.

template.h3: Keep your community engaged with an interactive website

li.p: Present studio offerings: In the Website app, showcase your wellbeing approach and membership options.

ol.li: Create engaging events: Use the Events app to organize and promote special sessions like prenatal yoga.
Enable easy online bookings: Utilize eCommerce features to set up online booking and secure payment options for classes.
Track and engage members: In the CRM app, each time a new yogi books a session, a new opportunity will be created to track and engage with potential long-term clients.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o_not_editable lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Go beyond a classic ecommerce page: Customize your pricing page to explain your different membership, make them attractive and link them to the right product.

template.h3: Special sales for private sessions and customized client requests

li.p: Create private session products: Set up offerings like "Private Yoga Class – Group Session" for tailored experiences.
Customize the "Contact Us" form: Adjust on your Studio Website, the form to handle specific requests such as corporate events or wellbeing retreats.

ol.li: Generate customized quotations: Use the "Private Yoga Class – Group Session (15+ People) Quotation Template" to quickly create tailored proposals for private or group bookings based on client requests.

h2.strong: Do you want to go further?

template.p: Odoo offers endless customization possibilities for your Yoga & Pilates Studio:

ul.li: Integrate WhatsApp to send automatic reminders to members about their upcoming sessions.
Set up a Point of Sale (POS) system to sell yoga mats, blocks, reformer socks, or a 5-class yoga package at your studio.
Leverage Social Marketing to promote your classes, share testimonials, and attract new members online.
Easily handle your accounting with the integrated Accounting App.

template.p: These all go free in your current subscription; feel free to explore! 🙃

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o_not_editable lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
